title: Deliciously Roasted Mediterranean Chestnut Skewers
description: A cozy Mediterranean dish featuring roasted chestnuts, perfect for a high-protein snack or dinner option. The combination of chestnuts, olive oil, and herbs creates a crispy and flavorful experience.
instructions: Preheat the robata grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, thyme, salt, and pepper.
Add the chopped chestnuts to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chestnuts onto skewers, leaving a small space between each chestnut.
Grill the skewers for 20-25 minutes, or until the chestnuts are tender and lightly charred.
Remove the skewers from the grill and sprinkle with crumbly feta cheese.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Let the skewers cool for a few minutes before serving.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
